pages.title: International Heat
pages.tagline: Feel the international heat rising tonight.

pages.body: Step into a sultry world where English whispers blend with Vietnamese allure over a swinging half-time groove. This track is a hypnotic journey through an international club, driven by massive sub bass and wobbly low-end that rattle your trunk while classic southern claps meet reggaeton-flavored percussion. Smooth female vocals float confidently atop lush pads, glossy keys, and atmospheric synth bells, creating a sensual cinematic feel shared with charismatic male call-and-response featuring occasional Dominican Spanish ad-libs. As you lose control to the deep basslines, bodies move together in perfect sync across different cities, capturing the very essence of cultural fusion and late night desire.
pages.styleSentence: A chopped and screwed female lead with confident English–Vietnamese topline floats over a swinging half-time groove featuring massive sub bass, wobbly low-end, trunk-rattling 808s, hypnotic reggaeton-flavored percussion mixed with classic southern clap patterns, hi-hat rolls, deep kick thumps, lush pads, glossy keys, atmospheric synth bells, and warm cello/viola lines for a sensual cinematic feel.

pages.text:
[Intro]
Female
Boy...
Why you leanin' in my ear?
Say it real clear...

Male
Mami...
I can feel that body talkin' from here...

Female
Anh ơi, nhìn em hoài làm chi?
Lại gần đi... (come see)

[Verse 1]
Female
I caught you staring from across the room
Don’t play shy, I can read your mood
One little touch, now your pulse go boom
Tonight I’m the fire, you the fuel in this world wide room

I see you thinking ‘bout me on your face
You want my hips movin’ all those ways
Right kinda wrong in the perfect place
No clothes, just skin, just sweat, just bass

Male
Oh...
Is that what you like?
You been teasing all night?

Female
Maybe...
You gon’ slide?

Male
Girl...
Let me feel that body ride...

[Pre-Chorus]
Female
Lại đây... nice and slow...
Đặt tay lên eo, feel the flow...

Male
Don’t stop...
stay close...

Female
Em muốn anh mất kiểm soát, you know...

Male
Yeah...
I already know...

[Chorus]
Female
International heat...
Sweat drippin’ down, two hearts off-beat...
Body on body, deeper in between...
Em muốn anh say, lost in my scene...

Male
Come ride...
don’t hide...
Right here by my side...

Female
Look in my eyes...

Male
That’s all it takes to slide...

Both
From Hanoi...
Sau Ho Chi Minh...
We fuckin’ to the rhythm of this international sin...

Female
Touch me right, don’t you ever play tame...
We fuckin’ to the rhythm of this chopped-up game...

[Drop]
Female
Move...
Move...
Move...
Move...

Male
Closer...
Closer...

Female
Cứ thế rung, cho em thêm, cho em more...

Male
Dám không? Take it lower than before...

[Verse 2]
Male
Brooklyn on my passport, southside in my soul
But tonight after Sài Gòn, we lose all control
You ain’t gotta talk much, I can read your curves
Every little grind say you know what you deserve

Female
Em không cần hứa đâu, just pull me near
Whisper in my neck how you want me here
No translation for the way I ache
Just your hands on my waist while our bodies shake

Em nóng như Sài Gòn trưa tháng Năm
Anh muốn em, cứ nói thẳng, không cần râm
I love it when you grab me, kiss me, lay me down
Put it on me slow, fuck me to the rhythm now

[Bridge]
Female
You don’t gotta promise me forever, baby, just tonight...
Cho em say trong vòng tay anh đến sáng mai...

Male
We can sweat out every secret ‘til the morning light...

Female
One more drink...
Một nụ hôn...

Male
One more dance...

Both
One more chance to lose control...

Female
Hôn em đi, until my lipstick gone...
We fuckin’ to the rhythm khi mà bass còn son...

[Final Chorus]
Both
International heat...
International flame...
Everybody watchin’ when you scream my name...

Female
From District 1, qua Thủ Đức, still no sleep...
Anh ôm em chặt, keep it dirty, keep it deep...

Male
Come ride...
don’t hide...
Right here, let it slide...

Female
Anh ơi, đừng dừng lại...
Cho em feel that vibe all night...

Both
From Hanoi...
Sau Ho Chi Minh...
Tell your friends...
Bring your friends...
Let this sin begin...

Female
Bodies talkin’, không cần câu từ...
We fuckin’ to the rhythm, every chop, every slur...

Male
Mami, despacito, but the club still loud...

Female
Un poquito más, make your queen so proud...

Both
International heat, international flame...
We fuckin’ to the rhythm of that dirty south game...

pages.vocalStyle: Smooth, sultry female lead with flirtatious delivery; charismatic male call-and-response featuring confident enunciation and occasional Dominican Spanish ad-libs.

members.name: LEAD VOX
members.bio: Floats confident vocals blending languages seamlessly.

members.name: BACKING VOX
members.bio: Adds charismatic enunciation and Spanish ad-libs freely.

members.name: DRUMS
members.bio: Keeps the floor shaking with classic southern patterns.

members.name: PERCUSSION
members.bio: Delivers hypnotic reggaeton rhythms that drive trance states.

members.name: BASS
members.bio: Provides massive sub bass for deep, trunk-rattling lows.

members.name: SYNTH
members.bio: Creates lush pads and atmospheric bells everywhere.

members.name: TEXTURES
members.bio: Weaves warm cello lines into the sensual cinematic mix.

members.name: GUITAR
members.bio: Adds a subtle layer beneath the glossy keys.

levels.name: WHISPERED CURIOSITY
levels.emotion: Whispered curiosity and tactile anticipation as the listener leans in to hear a secret.

levels.name: FIERY INVITATION
levels.emotion: Confident ownership and fiery invitation to join a worldwide dance floor.

levels.name: BOUNDARY DISSOLUTION
levels.emotion: Escalating heat and the dissolution of boundaries between two bodies.

levels.name: SENSORY OVERLOAD
levels.emotion: Cathartic release and overwhelming sensory overload as secrets are spilled.

levels.name: RHYTHMIC ABANDON
levels.emotion: Rhythmic abandon and bass-driven trance state.

levels.name: GLOBAL CONNECTION
levels.emotion: Global connection and shared experience across different cities.

levels.name: INTENSE SURRENDER
levels.emotion: Intense vulnerability and surrender to the music's pull.

levels.name: LINGERING ECHOES
levels.emotion: Lingering satisfaction and the echo of fame.
